lines.text: A Street: Monica and Phoebe are walking to a newsstand.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Do you think they have yesterday's daily news?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Why?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Just wanna check my horoscope, see if it was right.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Oh my God. (Grabs Phoebe and turns her away) Phoebe. Don't look now, but behind us is a guy who has the potential to break our hearts and plunge us into a pit of depression.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Where? (Turns to face him) Ooh, come to Momma.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: He's coming. Be cool, be cool, be cool.
The guy walks past them

lines.speaker: Guy
lines.text: Nice hat.

lines.speaker: Monica and Phoebe
lines.text: (in unison) Thanks.
The guy walks on

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: We should do something. Whistle.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: We are not going to whistle.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Come on, do it.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: No!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Do it!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: No!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Do it do it do it!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: (Shouts to the guy) Woo-woo!
The guy turns round, startled. Monica points to Phoebe. The guy gets hit by a truck

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: I can't believe you did that!
Opening Credits
Hospital, the guy is in a coma and Mon and Pheebs are visiting.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Why did I 'woo-hoo'? I mean, what was I hoping would happen? That-that he'd turn round and say 'I love that sound, I must have you now'?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: I just wish there was something we could do. (Bends down and talks to him) Hello. Hello, Coma Guy. GET UP, YOU GIRL SCOUT! UP! UP! UP!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Phoebe, what are you doing?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Maybe nobody's tried this.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: I wish we at least knew his name... Look at that face. I mean, even sleeping, he looks smart. I bet he's a lawyer.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Yeah, but did you see the dents in his knuckles? That means he's artistic.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Okay, he's a lawyer, who teaches sculpting on the side. And- he can dance!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Oh! And, he's the kinda guy who, when you're talking, he's listening, y'know, and not saying 'Yeah, I understand' but really wondering what you look like naked.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: I wish all guys could be like him.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: I know.
Monica and Rachel's, Monica and Phoebe are telling everyone about their coma guy.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Are there no conscious men in the city for you two?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: He doesn't have anyone.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Yeah, we-we feel kinda responsible.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: I can't believe you said woowoo. I don't even say woowoo.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh, she's coming up! She's coming up! (Turns on the TV)

lines.speaker: Jay Leno
lines.text: (on TV) Folks, when we come back we'll be talking about her new book, 'Euphoria Unbound': the always interesting Nora Tyler Bing. You might wanna put the kids to bed for this one.
Everyone has settled down to watch, except Chandler

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Y'know, we don't have to watch this. Weekend At Bernie's is on Showtime, HBO, and Cinemax.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: No way, forget it.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: C'mon, she's your mom!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Exactly. Weekend At Bernie's! Dead guy getting hit in the groin twenty, thirty times! No?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Chandler, I gotta tell you, I love your mom's books! I love her books! I cannot get on a plane without one! I mean, this is so cool!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Yeah, well, you wouldn't think it was cool if you're eleven years old and all your friends are passing around page 79 of 'Mistress Bitch.'

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: C'mon, Chandler, I love your mom. I think she's a blast.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: You can say that because she's not your mom.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Oh, please...
Rachel opens the door to Paolo

lines.speaker: Paolo
lines.text: Bona sera.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh, hi sweetie. (They kiss)

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: When did Rigatoni get back from Rome?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Last night.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Ah, so then his plane didn't explode in a big ball of fire?... Just a dream I had- but, phew.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Hey hey hey! She's on!

lines.speaker: Paolo
lines.text: Ah! Nora Bing!

lines.speaker: Jay Leno
lines.text: (on TV) ...Now what is this about you-you being arrested i-in London? What is that all about?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Your mom was arrested?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Shhh, busy beaming with pride.

lines.speaker: Mrs. Bing
lines.text: (on TV) ...This is kind of embarrassing, but occasionally after I've been intimate with a man...

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Now why would she say that's embarrassing?

lines.speaker: All
lines.text: Shhh.

lines.speaker: Mrs. Bing
lines.text: (on TV) ...I just get this craving for Kung Pow Chicken.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: THAT'S TOO MUCH INFORMATION!!

lines.speaker: Jay Leno
lines.text: (on TV) Alright, so now you're doing this whole book tour thing, how is that going?

lines.speaker: Mrs. Bing
lines.text: (on TV) Oh, fine. I'm leaving for New York tomorrow, which I hate- but I get to see my son, who I love...

lines.speaker: All
lines.text: Awww!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: This is the way that I find out. Most moms use the phone.

lines.speaker: Jay Leno
lines.text: (on TV) Y'know, don't take this wrong, I-I just don't see you a-as a mom, somehow.. I don't mean that, I don't mean that bad...

lines.speaker: Mrs. Bing
lines.text: (on TV) Oh no, I am a fabulous mom! I bought my son his first condoms.
The gang turn to look at Chandler

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: ...And then he burst into flames.
The Hospital, it's a montage of Monica and Phoebe's visit to the hospital with My Guy playing in the background.  It starts with Monica reading a newspaper to him.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Let's see. Congress is debating a new deficit reduction bill... the mayor wants to raise subway fares again... the high today was forty-five... and- oh, teams played sports.
[Next is a shot of them dragging an enormous plant into the room, then Monica knitting a sweater, then Phoebe singing, then Phoebe shaving him and chatting to Monica]

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: What about Glen? He could be a Glen.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Nah... not-not special enough.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Ooh! How about Agamemnon?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Waaay too special.
A Mexican Restaurant, Monica, Phoebe, Joey, Chandler and his mom are there.

lines.speaker: Mrs. Bing
lines.text: I am famished. What do I want... (Looks at Chandler's menu)

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Please God don't let it be Kung Pow Chicken.

lines.speaker: Mrs. Bing
lines.text: Oh, you watched the show! What'd you think?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Well, I think you need to come out of your shell just a little.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: (Entering) What is this dive? Only you could've picked this place.

lines.speaker: Mrs. Bing
lines.text: Oooh, c'mon, shut up, it's fun. Gimme a hug. (They both sit down) Well, I think we're ready for some tequila.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: I know I am.

lines.speaker: Mrs. Bing
lines.text: Who's doing shots?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Yeah.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: I'm in.

lines.speaker: Mrs. Bing
lines.text: There y'go. Ross?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Uh, I'm not really a shot drinking kinda guy.
Enter Rachel and Paolo. They are both somewhat flustered

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Hi! Sorry- sorry we're late, we, uh, kinda just, y'know, lost track of time.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: ...But a man can change. (Downs a shot)
[Time lapse. Ross is now clearly drunk. He is holding up a shot glass to his eye like a jeweller's eye.]

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Anyone want me to appraise anything?
Rachel feeds something to Paolo. He eats it and licks her hand

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Mrs. Bing, I have to tell you, I've read everything you've ever written. No, I mean it! I mean, when I read Euphoria at Midnight, all I wanted to do was become a writer.

lines.speaker: Mrs. Bing
lines.text: Oh, please, honey, listen, if I can do it, anybody can. You just start with half a dozen European cities, throw in thirty euphemisms for male genitalia, and bam! You have got yourself a book.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Myyy mother, ladies and gentlemen.
[Cut to Mrs. Bing on the telephone.]

lines.speaker: Mrs. Bing
lines.text: Yeah, any messages for room 226?
Ross emerges from a toilet marked 'Chicas'

lines.speaker: Mrs. Bing
lines.text: You okay there, slugger?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Yeah, I'm fine, I'm fine. (A woman emerges from the toilet behind him and he tries to pretend he was in the other one)

lines.speaker: Mrs. Bing
lines.text: What is with you tonight?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Nothing. Nothing nothing nothing.

lines.speaker: Mrs. Bing
lines.text: (To phone) Okay, thank you. (To Ross) It's the Italian Hand-Licker, isn't it.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: No. It's the one he's licking.

lines.speaker: Mrs. Bing
lines.text: She's supposed to be with you.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: You're good.

lines.speaker: Mrs. Bing
lines.text: Oh, Ross, listen to me. I have sold a hundred million copies of my books, and y'know why?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: The girl on the cover with her nipples showing?

lines.speaker: Mrs. Bing
lines.text: No. Because I know how to write men that women fall in love with. Believe me, I cannot sell a Paolo. People will not turn three hundred twenty-five pages for a Paolo. C'mon, the guy's a secondary character, a, y'know, complication you eventually kill off.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: When?

lines.speaker: Mrs. Bing
lines.text: He's not a hero. ...You know who our hero is.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: The guy on the cover with his nipples showing?

lines.speaker: Mrs. Bing
lines.text: No, it's you!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Please.

lines.speaker: Mrs. Bing
lines.text: No, really, c'mon. You're smart, you're sexy...

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Right.

lines.speaker: Mrs. Bing
lines.text: You are gonna be fine, believe me.
She kisses him on the cheek

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Uh-oh...
...Then full on the mouth
Enter Joey

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Uhhhh.... I'll just pee in the street.
Commercial Break
Chandler and Joey's, the next morning. Joey is getting the door in his dressing gown-it's Ross.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Hey, is Chandler here?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Yeah.
Ross drags Joey into the hall and slams the door

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Okay, uh, about last night, um, Chandler.. you didn't tell... (Joey shakes his head) Okay, 'cause I'm thinking- we don't need to tell Chandler, I mean, it was just a kiss, right? One kiss? No big deal? Right?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Right. No big deal.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Okay.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: In Bizarro World!! You broke the code!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: What code?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: You don't kiss your friend's mom! Sisters are okay, maybe a hot-lookin' aunt... but not a mom, never a mom!
Chandler opens the door and startles them. He picks up the paper

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: What are you guys doing out here?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Uh.. uh.. Well, Joey and I had discussed getting in an early morning racquetball game. But, um, apparently, somebody overslept.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Yeah, well, you don't have your racket.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: No, no I don't, because it's being restrung, somebody was supposed to bring me one.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Yeah, well you didn't call and leave your grip size.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Okay, you guys spend waaaay too much time together. (Goes back inside and shuts the door)

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Okay, I'm scum, I'm scum.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Ross, how could you let this happen?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: I don't know, God, I... well, it's not like she's a regular mom, y'know? She's, she's sexy, she's...

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: You don't think my mom's sexy?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Well... not in the same way...

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: I'll have you know that Gloria Tribbiani was a handsome woman in her day, alright? You think it's easy giving birth to seven children?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Okay, I think we're getting into a weird area here...
Monica and Rachel's door opens and Rachel and Paolo emerge

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Hey.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Hey.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: What're you guys doing out here?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Well, not playing raquetball!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: He forgot to leave his grip size!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: He didn't get the goggles!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Well,sounds like you two have issues.
She and Paolo walk a little way down the hall

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Goodbye, baby.

lines.speaker: Paolo
lines.text: Ciao, bela.
They kiss. Ross is watching them

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Do they wait for me to do this?
Joey and Ross go into Monica and Rachel's apartment

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: So are you gonna tell him?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Why would I tell him?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: How about 'cause if you don't, his mother might.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Oh...

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: (Entering) What are you guys doing here?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Uhhhh.... he's not even wearing a jockstrap!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: ...What did I ask?
Hospital. Phoebe is there stroking Coma Guy's hair, when Monica enters with a bunch of balloons.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Hi.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Hi.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: What are you doing here?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Nothing, I just thought I'd stop by.. y'know, after the uh... that I.. y'know, so what are you doing here?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: I'm not really here. Just thought I'd drop these off...on the way.. my way... Do you come here a lot? Without me?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: No. (Monica brushes Coma Guy's hair in the other direction) No! No! ...So, um, do you think he's doing any better than he was this morning?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: How would I know? I-I wasn't here.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Really? Not even to, um, change his PAJAMAS?! (Whips back the sheet to reveal him wearing new pajamas.)
Chandler and Joey's, Ross is talking to Chandler. Joey is making a snack at the bar.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Oh my God.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: You're my friend. I-I had to tell you.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: I can't believe it. Paolo kissed my mom?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Yeah, um, I don't know if you noticed, but he had a lot to drink, and you know how he gets when he's drun..uh... (He has caught sight of Joey scowling at him) I can't do this, I did it, it was me, I'm sorry, I kissed your mom.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: I was really upset about Rachel and Paolo, and I think I had too much tequila, and Nora- um, Mrs. Mom- your Bing- was just being nice, y'know, and- But nothing happened, nothing- Ask Joey, Joey, uh, came in-

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: (To Joey) You knew about this?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Uh... y'know, knowledge is a tricky thing.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: I spent the entire day with you, why didn't you tell me?!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Hey, hey, hey, you're lucky I caught them when I did, or else who knows what woulda happened.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Thanks, man, big help.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: (To Ross) I can't believe this! What the hell were you thinking?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: I wasn't- I mean, I-

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Y'know, of all my friends, no-one knows the crap I go through with my mom more than you.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: I know-

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: I can't believe you did this. (Walks toward the door)

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Chandler-

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Me neither, y'know what-

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: I'm still mad at you for not telling me.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: What are you mad at me for?!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Chandler-

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: You gotta let me slam the door! (Leaves; slams the door)

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (Shouting after him) Chandler, I didn't kiss her, he did! (To Ross) See what happens when you break the code?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Joey-

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Ah! (Points to door) Huh? (Leaves and slams the door)
Central Perk, everyone is there except for Chandler.  Rachel is writing something and Monica walks up.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Hey.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Hey.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: (Reading) 'A Woman Undone, by Rachel Karen Green'.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Yeah. Thought I'd give it a shot. I'm still on the first chapter. Now, do you think his 'love stick can be liberated from its denim prison'?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: (Reads) Yeah, I'd say so. And there's no 'j' in 'engorged'.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: (Walks up with her guitar) Hey Rach.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Hey.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Hello.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Hello.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Going to the hospital tonight?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: No, you?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: No, you?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: You just asked me.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Okay, maybe it was a trick question. (Plays a few chords) Um, Rachel can we do this now?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Okay. (Writes a little more) I am so hot!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (To Ross, on the couch) Now, here's a picture of my mother and father on their wedding day. Now you tell me she's not a knockout.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: I cannot believe we're having this conversation.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: C'mon! Just try to picture her not pregnant, that's all.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: (Into microphone) Central Perk is proud to present Miss Phoebe Buffay.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Thanks. Hi, um, 'kay. I'd like to start with a song that's about a man that I recently met, who's, um, come to be very important to me. (Monica gives her a look) 'Kay. (Sung:)
You don't have to be awake to be my man,
As long as you have brainwaves I'll be there to hold your hand.
Though we just met the other day,
There's something I have got to say...
She sees Monica sneaking out) Okay, thank you very much, I'm gonna take a short break! (Runs out, knocking over the mike stand

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: (Into mike) Okay, that was Phoebe Buffay, everybody. Woo!
Enter Chandler

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: What was that?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Oh, uh, Phoebe just started a...

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Yeah, I believe I was talking to Joey, alright there, Mother-Kisser? (Goes to the counter)

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (Laughing) Mother-Kisser... (Sees Ross's look) I'll shut up.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Chandler, can I just say something? I-I know you're still mad at me, I just wanna say that there were two people there that night. Okay? Two sets of lips.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Yes, well, I expect this from her. Okay? She's always been a Freudian nightmare.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Okay, well, if she always behaves like this, why don't you say something?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Because it's complicated, it's complex- Hey, you kissed my mom!
People turn to look

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: (To the rest of Central Perk) We're rehearsing a Greek play.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: That's very funny. We done now?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: No! Okay, you mean, you're not gonna talk to her, you're not gonna tell her how you feel?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: That would be no. Look, just because you played tonsil tennis with my mom doesn't mean you know her. Alright? Trust me, you can't talk to her.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Okay, 'you' can't, or (Points to Chandler) you can't? (Chandler grabs his finger) Okay, that's my finger. (Chandler twists it and Ross goes down on one knee) That's, that's my knee. (To Central Perk) Still doing the play. Aaah!
The Coma Guy's Room, Monica bursts in, closely followed by Phoebe. There is no sign of Coma Guy.  His bed is empty.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Alright, whadyou do with him?
There is the sound of a flushing toilet and Coma Guy emerges from the bathroom

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Oh! You're awake!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Look at you! How, how do you feel?

lines.speaker: Coma Guy
lines.text: Uh, a little woozy, but basically okay.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: You look good!

lines.speaker: Coma Guy
lines.text: I feel good! ...Who are you?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Oh, sorry.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: I'm Phoebe Buffay.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: I'm Monica Geller. I've been taking care of you.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Well, we both have.

lines.speaker: Coma Guy
lines.text: So, the Etch-a-Sketch is from you guys?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Well, actually it's just from me.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: I got you the foot massager.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: You know who shaved you? That was me.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: I read to you.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: I sang. (To Monica) Hah!

lines.speaker: Coma Guy
lines.text: Well,... thanks.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Oh, my pleasure.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: You're welcome.

lines.speaker: Coma Guy
lines.text: So. I guess I'll see you around.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: What, that's it?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: "See you around?"

lines.speaker: Coma Guy
lines.text: Well, what do you want me to say?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Oh, I don't know. Maybe, um, "That was nice?" Admit something to me? "I'll call you?"

lines.speaker: Coma Guy
lines.text: Alright, I'll call you.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: I don't think you mean that.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: This is so typical. Y'know, we give, and we give, and we give. And then- we just get nothing back! And then one day, y'know, it's just, you wake up, and "See you around!" Let's go, Phoebe.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Y'know what? We thought you were different. But I guess it was just the coma.
Chandler and Joey's Chandler is talking with his mom.

lines.speaker: Mrs. Bing
lines.text: Car's waiting downstairs, I just wanted to drop off these copies of my book for your friends. Anything you want from Lisbon?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: No, just knowing you're gonna be there is enough.

lines.speaker: Mrs. Bing
lines.text: Alright, well, be good, I love you. (Kisses him and goes to leave)

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: You kissed my best Ross! ...Or something to that effect.

lines.speaker: Mrs. Bing
lines.text: (Reentering) O-kay. Look, it, it was stupid.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Really stupid.

lines.speaker: Mrs. Bing
lines.text: Really stupid. And I don't even know how it happened. I'm sorry, honey, I promise it will never happen again. Are we okay now?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Yeah. No. No...
[Cut to the hallway, Joey is listening to Chandler and his mom's conversation through the door as Ross walks up.]

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Ah, the forbidden love of a man and his door.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Shh. He did it. He told her off, and not just about the kiss, about everything.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: You're kidding.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: No, no. He said "When are you gonna grow up and start being a mom?"

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Wow!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Then she came back with "The question is, when are you gonna grow up and realise I have a bomb?"

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: 'Kay, wait a minute, are you sure she didn't say "When are you gonna grow up and realise I am your mom?"

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: That makes more sense.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: So, what's going on now?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: I dunno, I've been standing here spelling it out for you! (Goes back to the door) I don't hear anything. Oh, wait, wait, wait. (Looks through the spyhole)

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Whaddya see?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Hard to tell, they're so tiny and upside-down. Wait, wait. They're walking away... they're walking away... No, no they're not, they're coming right at us! Run! Run!
Joey runs off down the hall. Ross tries Monica and Rachel's apartment, but it is locked so he has to stand in the hall and pretend he wasn't listening. Chandler and his mom come out

lines.speaker: Mrs. Bing
lines.text: You okay, kiddo?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Yeah, okay.

lines.speaker: Mrs. Bing
lines.text: Alright. (Kisses him)

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Nice save.
She walks down the hall

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: (Very politely) Mrs. Bing.

lines.speaker: Mrs. Bing
lines.text: Mr. Geller.
She leaves
Ross knocks on Monica and Rachel's door

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Hey.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: You mean that?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Yeah, why not. (They shake hands) So I told her.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Yeah? How'd it go?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Awful. Awful. Couldn'ta gone worse.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Well, howdya feel?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Pretty good! I told her.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Well, see? So, maybe it wasn't such a bad idea, y'know, me kissing your mom, uh? Huh? (Wags his finger at Chandler, then puts it down) But.. we don't have to go down that road.
Closing Credits
Monica and Rachel's, Rachel is handing out copies of her book to the gang.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Okay. Now this is just the first chapter, and I want your absolute honest opinion. Oh, oh, and on page two, he's not 'reaching for her heaving beasts'.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: What's a 'niffle'?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: You usually find them on the 'heaving beasts'.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Alright, alright, so I'm not a great typist...

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Wait, did you get to the part about his 'huge throbbing pens'? Tell ya, you don't wanna be around when he starts writing with those!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Alright, that's it! Give it back! That's it!

lines.speaker: All
lines.text: Nooo!
End
